name: mfa_enrollment
description: an MFA enrollment and recovery world; actions enroll, challenge, recover, lock

card.description: an MFA enrollment and recovery world; actions enroll, challenge, recover, lock

rules: enroll registers a factor only on an unlocked account with no factor yet; it issues recovery_codes (default 10) and leaves the session unverified.
challenge verifies the session on success and resets failed_attempts; on failure it increments failed_attempts and clears verified.
challenge is a no-op unless the account is enrolled and unlocked.
the account locks automatically once failed_attempts reaches max_attempts.
recover spends one recovery_code to unlock the account, reset failed_attempts, and re-verify the session; it requires a code to remain.
lock locks the account immediately and drops any verified session.

emit.report: MFA status: enrolled={enrolled} factor={factor} verified={verified} locked={locked} failed_attempts={failed_attempts} recovery_codes={recovery_codes}
